ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #6, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Apr-15-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for Debra Dolch.

The Court stated that it seems under the circumstances that it is wise to continue the Conservatorship and a benefit to Ms. Henken to have Debra Dolch in place. Ms. Alavi stated that she had no objection if the Court wants to take the Special Needs Trust out from Court supervision. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
